identity.name: Virreina Palace
identity.address: La Rambla, 99, Ciutat Vella, 08002 Barcelona, Spain

discovery.text: Verified for the Las Ramblas section: La Virreina is directly on La Rambla and functions as one of the promenade's serious civic/cultural interiors.

narrative.summary: Street-defining image centre on Las Ramblas — a palace that gives the promenade cultural weight.
